answer:
The efficiency of the motor is calculated as:

\[
\text{Efficiency} = \left( \frac{\text{Output Power (hp)}}{\text{Input Power (kW)}} \right) \times 100
\]

First, convert 7 hp to kW (1 hp ≈ 0.746 kW):
\[
7 \text{ hp} \times 0.746 = 5.222 \text{ kW}
\]

Then, calculate efficiency:
\[
\frac{5.222}{6.3} \times 100 \approx 82.9\%
\]

The closest option is **F. 83%**.

\[
\boxed{F}
\]
